tldr: Tadej Pogačar took the reduced-bunch finish in Martigny, with Lipowitz, Lenny Martinez and Visma's Jørgen Nordhagen all same time. Pogačar into yellow on day one of actual racing.

narrative.headline: Pogačar takes yellow
narrative.body: 171.2 km circuit around Martigny with three early laps of La Rasse. Reduced-bunch finish; Pogačar's sprint kick saw off Lipowitz and Lenny Martinez. Nordhagen — Visma's young Norwegian climber — 4th s.t.

gcImpact.headline: Pogačar into yellow
gcImpact.body: From sixth in the prologue to leader's jersey on time bonuses and stage selection. The week's GC question now Pogačar's to answer.

riderPerformances.name: Tadej Pogačar
riderPerformances.narrative: First stage win of Romandie. Three days before Liège-Bastogne-Liège (which he'd also win), the form was confirmed.
